seoDescription: Initiate an engineering engagement. Provide your project parameters to align on technical architecture and business objectives.
keywords: project intake, project scoping, custom software discovery, AI system discovery
headline: Project Discovery
supportingText: This portal allows us to align on the technical requirements and business objectives before our first technical review.
title: Project Discovery
subtitle: Initiate an engineering engagement. This portal allows us to align on the technical requirements and business objectives before our first technical review.

discovery.title: Project Discovery
discovery.description: Define the fundamental nature and industry context of the initiative.

business.title: Business Objectives
business.description: Articulate the acute problem and the measurable outcomes required.

technical.title: Technical Landscape
technical.description: Specify the required intelligence layer and existing integration boundaries.

delivery.title: Delivery Expectations
delivery.description: Outline the schedule and financial framework for execution.

partnership.title: Partnership Details
partnership.description: Provide contact information for the engineering review.

review.title: Final Review
review.description: Review the discovery parameters before final submission.

currentSituation.label: Current Architecture / Bottleneck
currentSituation.placeholder: Describe the current state or the technical limitation...

desiredOutcome.label: Target State
desiredOutcome.placeholder: What does technical and business success look like in 12 months?

currentSystems.label: Current Systems (Yes/No)
currentSystems.placeholder: Do you have existing systems or software?

options.no: No, this is built from scratch

preferredStartDate.label: Preferred Start Date
preferredStartDate.placeholder: When would you like to start? (e.g., Q3 2026)

additionalComments.label: Additional Comments
additionalComments.placeholder: Any other details, requirements, or comments...

actions.successMessage: Your engineering parameters have been securely transmitted. Our technical leads will review the architecture constraints.
